title: Two-Column Tableau Configuration Modal with Embedded Tutorial Video
story: As a product administrator setting up the Tableau integration, I want to see a tutorial video and link alongside the configuration fields, so that I can follow along and complete the setup correctly on my first attempt.
description:
Redesigns the Tableau configuration modal to a two-column layout. The left column contains the four credential input fields (server, content URL, PAT name, PAT secret). The right column embeds a tutorial video and provides a link to the full written tutorial on datatoolspro.com.

This pattern establishes a consistent onboarding experience for service connections. The same layout will be reused for Notion and other future integrations that require external service authentication.
acceptance_criteria: Modal displays in a two-column layout
Left column contains all four Tableau credential fields
Right column embeds the tutorial video from YouTube
A View Tutorial link below the video opens the datatoolspro.com tutorial in a new window
Layout is responsive and usable at various screen sizes
ux_changes: Redesigned the Tableau configuration modal to a two-column layout with credential fields on the left and an embedded YouTube tutorial video with a link to the full tutorial on the right.
implementation_notes: This establishes a reusable pattern for service connection modals. The same layout will be applied to Notion integration and any future third-party service connections.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented the two-column modal on staging and requested the tutorial video for the Notion integration as well.
